Read an Auth Failure

An auth failure is not one problem. It can mean no credentials, expired SSO, missing model access, or a blocked action.

PowerShell checks

$env:AWS_PROFILE = "learning-dev"
aws sts get-caller-identity --profile $env:AWS_PROFILE
aws bedrock list-foundation-models --region us-east-2 --profile $env:AWS_PROFILE

Interpretation

  • No caller identity means credentials or SSO session.
  • Caller identity works but Bedrock fails means permissions, region, or model access.
  • Streaming starts then fails means provider request shape or model routing.
